title: PTCLR Method, Spel Class
description: Clears and initializes the peak torque for one or more joints.
notes:
PTCLR clears the peak torque values for the specified joints.

You must execute PTCLR before executing PTRQ.
see_also:
ATCLR, ATRQ, PTRQ

PTCLR Example

VB Example:

m_spel.PTCLR()

C# Example:

m_spel.PTCLR();
